_meta.ai_asset_version_note: C5 — bump on every content edit (not schema edit). The ai-asset-versioning validator FAILs if content hash changed without this bumping. Owner: AI Engineer.
_meta.description: AI agent eval fixtures. Each agent_id maps to a list of {question, expected_keywords, expected_shape} fixtures. The LLM-as-judge cron (ai-eval-daily, 03:30 UTC) compares live agent responses against these fixtures and writes scores to ai_quality_log.

schema.id: string (unique fixture id; eval logs reference this)
schema.question: string (the user prompt sent to the agent)
schema.expected_keywords: string[] (keywords that MUST appear in the answer)
schema.expected_shape: object | null (JSON shape the answer must satisfy if jsonMode)
schema.context: object | null (additional context passed in the gateway call)

_meta.scoring: LLM-as-judge gives 0-100 score per fixture; passed = score >= 70 AND all expected_keywords present

asset-brain.question: What is the failure history of this asset?
When is the next PM due?
Have similar pumps failed recently? What was the root cause?

analytics.question: What was OEE last week and what drove it?
Show MTBF trend by asset for the last 30 days.
Is there a correlation between PM gaps and failures?

project.question: What's blocking us on this project?
Are there pending change orders that affect the critical path?

shift.question: Generate the handover for the next shift.
What critical alerts should the next shift watch for?
Which workers are on the next shift?

logbook-voice.question: Pump 5 bearing replacement, took 3 hours, used 2 SKF 6205 bearings.
Motor M-12 vibration high, found loose coupling, tightened bolts.
Panel ELEC-3 tripped twice today, replaced fuse 32A on circuit 7.

report-voice.question: Send the daily report to the supervisor.
Send an incident report about the pump 5 failure to maintenance lead.
Send the shift handover summary to the night-shift supervisor.
